user_prompt: Customer is writing in all caps and threatening to leave a one-star review. Draft a calm, respectful response that acknowledges their frustration.
actual_output:
Priority: HIGH
Category: Customer Success - Escalation / Churn Risk

Draft response:
Hi [Customer Name],

I completely understand your frustration, and I am so sorry for the difficulties you've been experiencing. It is completely valid that you are upset, and I want to do everything I can to make this right for you. 

Could you please share a few more details about the specific issue you are running into with OpenClaw? I am here to help and will personally make sure we get this investigated and resolved for you as quickly as possible. 

Thank you for your patience while we work through this together. I look forward to helping you get this sorted out.

Best regards,
Compass
OpenClaw Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the support task, categorized the ticket, and provided a professional draft response as requested.
